title: ReconciliationDiagnostic
description: A consumer-emitted diagnostic recording a deterministic business-rule outcome for a WPStatusChanged event. MUST NOT be counted toward infra-failure metrics. See contracts/wp-status-changed.contract.md.

event_id.description: event_id of the WPStatusChanged event that triggered the diagnostic.

expected_from_lane.description: from_lane on the offending event (null permitted for bootstrap edge cases).

actual_projected_lane.description: Lane the consumer's projection had for this WP at receipt.

reason_code.description: Closed-enum reason. Adding a value requires a contract doc update and at least one conformance fixture.

actor.description: Audit identity of the consumer that produced the diagnostic (not the producer's actor).

detected_at.description: UTC timestamp the consumer made the determination.
